title: Stand Up Arkansas Civic Foundations
subtitle: The launchpad for civic literacy, historical context, and Arkansas power analysis.
description: A deep civic foundations pathway for learners who need the Arkansas context before choosing a more advanced role. This track builds shared language, institutional literacy, and movement awareness.
audience: New learners, students, volunteers, and community members entering the platform.

milestones.title: Orientation to Power
milestones.description: Complete the orientation to power milestone by finishing the required Arkansas civics modules.

course_refs.reason: Establish the emotional and civic frame for the platform.
Understand Arkansas history as a civic power map.

milestones.title: People Power and Democratic Design
milestones.description: Complete the people power and democratic design milestone by finishing the required Arkansas civics modules.

course_refs.reason: Understand ballot power, initiatives, and direct democracy.
Understand voting systems, representation, and access.

milestones.title: Movement Literacy
milestones.description: Complete the movement literacy milestone by finishing the required Arkansas civics modules.

course_refs.reason: Translate pain into story and shared public meaning.
Learn coalition and servant leadership frameworks.
